title: RL + genetic/evolutionary hybrids for NAS / HPO / architecture search

design_notes.constraint: Outer loop for DenoiseOpt N=256 residual bake; honest naming (not claimed SOTA)
design_notes.depth_objective: Prefer deeper composable graphs when residual holds (depth bias + searchable max depth)
design_notes.mixture_objective: MoE-style soft gates over heterogeneous blocks (unet+attn+dilated…)

outer_loop_implemented.GA: tournament parent selection + block/op/hp crossover + mutation (Holland/Real-style NAS evo)
outer_loop_implemented.PPO: Schulman clipped surrogate proposes discrete arch mutations / parent slots
outer_loop_implemented.PBT: Jaderberg-inspired exploit elites + mutate (not full distributed PBT)
outer_loop_implemented.ERL_inspired: Interleave GA population steps with PPO policy updates (Khadka/Tumer ERL spirit, tiny scale)

key_papers_to_cite_accurately: Jaderberg et al. — Population Based Training
Real et al. — Regularized Evolution / Aging Evolution / AmoebaNet
Zoph & Le / Pham et al. — RL-NAS / ENAS
Liu et al. — DARTS (screened: differentiable, not our discrete loop)
Shazeer et al. — Mixture-of-Experts soft gating
He et al. — Residual depth / identity mappings enabling deeper nets
design_notes.claim_hygiene: Log branch names GA_CROSSOVER / PPO_MUTATION / PBT_EXPLOIT / MoE_SOFTGATE — no false SOTA claims
